sectionTitle: Learning by shipping, collaborating, and showing up where the challenge is hard.

entries.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Built internal dashboards and reusable UI components for faster product iteration.
Optimized API flows and improved performance on core student-facing screens.
Worked closely with mentors on clean code, reviews, and deploy discipline.

entries.title: Hackathon Winner
highlights: Led the frontend and demo flow for a project focused on accessible productivity.
Shipped a polished prototype under time pressure with a strong storytelling pitch.
Won for execution quality, practical value, and presentation clarity.

entries.title: Open Source Contribution
highlights: Contributed bug fixes and documentation improvements to beginner-friendly repos.
Learned collaborative workflows through issues, reviews, and maintainers' feedback.
Built confidence in contributing beyond personal projects.
